name: bulletz.io
author: Poki
description: bulletz.io is a multiplayer game that combines the classic snake game with fast-paced shooting action! Eat food to grow your character, but watch out for enemy bullets! The bigger you get, the stronger your bullets become—but you’ll also move slower, so plan your moves carefully. Dominate the battlefield, outmaneuver your rivals, and grow large enough to claim the title of king in bulletz.io! Are you ready for the challenge? How to play bulletz.io? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Shoot: left click Who created bulletz.io? bulletz.io is created by Yeti Studios. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play bulletz.io for free? You can play bulletz.io for free on Poki. Can I play bulletz.io on mobile devices and desktop? bulletz.io can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
